mapper.sql: id, problem_id, parent_id, content, author_id, author_name, like_count, reply_to_id, reply_to_user_id, reply_to_user_name, reply_count, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oj_problem_comment (problem_id, parent_id, content, author_id, author_name, like_count, reply_to_id, reply_to_user_id, reply_to_user_name, reply_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{problemId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{likeCount}, #{replyToId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{replyToUserName}, #{replyCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oj_problem_comment WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND parent_id = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT FROM oj_problem_comment WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND parent_id = 0 AND status = 1
ORDER BY like_count DESC, create_time DESC
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT FROM oj_problem_comment WHERE parent_id = #{commentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM oj_problem_comment WHERE parent_id = #{commentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time ASC
